ddls:
CREATE TABLE "residents" (
  "resident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resident */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the resident */,
  "address" TEXT /* Residential address */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the resident */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for accessing the system */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for accessing the system */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the resident (e.g., resident, utility worker, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evs" (
  "ev_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each EV */,
  "resident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the resident owning the EV */,
  "ev_type" TEXT /* Type of EV (e.g., Sedan, Small, SUV) */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Time of EV arrival at the charging station */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Time of EV departure from the charging station */,
  "ev_demand" REAL /* EV power demand */,
  "ev_power" REAL /* EV power consumption */,
  "ev_distance" REAL /* Distance the EV needs to travel on a full charge */,
  "ev_soc_low" REAL /* Lowest SOC level for the EV */,
  "ev_soc_up" REAL /* Highest SOC level for the EV */,
  "ev_soc_arrival" REAL /* SOC level at the time of arrival */,
  "battery_capacity" REAL /* Battery capacity of the EV */,
  "charger_type" TEXT /* Type of charger (e.g., Level 1, Level 2, DC Fast) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ev_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evs_resident_id FOREIGN KEY ("resident_id") REFERENCES residents ("resident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charging_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charging session */,
  "ev_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the EV involved in the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the charging session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the charging session */,
  "energy_consumed" REAL /* Total energy consumed during the session */,
  "charging_speed" REAL /* Charging speed of the session */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charging_sessions_ev_id FOREIGN KEY ("ev_id") REFERENCES evs ("ev_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "smart_loads" (
  "load_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each smart load */,
  "load_type" TEXT /* Type of smart load */,
  "load_status" TEXT /* Current status of the load (e.g., on, off) */,
  "energy_consumption" REAL /* Energy consumption of the load */,
  "power_rating" REAL /* Power rating of the load */,
  "voltage_rating" REAL /* Voltage rating of the load */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("load_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cooling_systems" (
  "cooling_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cooling system */,
  "cooling_type" TEXT /* Type of cooling system */,
  "cooling_status" TEXT /* Current status of the cooling system */,
  "energy_consumption" REAL /* Energy consumption of the cooling system */,
  "cop" REAL /* Coefficient of Performance (COP) of the cooling system */,
  "max_capacity" REAL /* Maximum capacity of the cooling system */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta parameter for the cooling system */,
  "temperature_low" REAL /* Lower temperature limit for the cooling system */,
  "temperature_up" REAL /* Upper temperature limit for the cooling system */,
  "humidity_level" REAL /* Humidity level of the cooling system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cooling_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy consumption record */,
  "resident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the resident */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the energy consumption record */,
  "total_energy_consumed" REAL /* Total energy consumed by the resident */,
  "peak_demand" REAL /* Peak demand of the resident */,
  "off_peak_demand" REAL /* Off-peak demand of the resident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_resident_id FOREIGN KEY ("resident_id") REFERENCES residents ("resident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grid_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grid status record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the grid status record */,
  "load_level" REAL /* Current load level on the grid */,
  "voltage_level" REAL /* Voltage level on the grid */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the grid */,
  "grid_health" TEXT /* Health status of the grid (e.g., normal, warning, critical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "resident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the resident or utility staff */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message content of the alert */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., energy consumption, grid status, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resident_id FOREIGN KEY ("resident_id") REFERENCES residents ("resident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., resident, utility worker, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, data retrieval) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ev_charging_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charging schedule */,
  "resident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the resident */,
  "ev_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the EV */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the charging schedule */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the charging schedule */,
  "charging_speed" REAL /* Charging speed of the schedule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ev_charging_schedules_resident_id FOREIGN KEY ("resident_id") REFERENCES residents ("resident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ev_charging_schedules_ev_id FOREIGN KEY ("ev_id") REFERENCES evs ("ev_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ev_charging_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charging preference */,
  "resident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the resident */,
  "ev_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the EV */,
  "preferred_charging_time" TEXT /* Preferred charging time */,
  "preferred_charging_speed" REAL /* Preferred charging speed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ev_charging_preferences_ev_id FOREIGN KEY ("ev_id") REFERENCES evs ("ev_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ev_charging_preferences_resident_id FOREIGN KEY ("resident_id") REFERENCES residents ("resident_id")
)
